final:
module register_16bit_with_enable(
    input wire clk,
    input wire rst,
    input wire en,
    input wire [15:0] d,
    output reg [15:0] q
);

      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (rst) begin
            q <= 16'b0000000000000000;
        end else if (en) begin
            q <= d;
        end
    end
endmodule
